member_message: My frozen açaí bowls arrived completely thawed and leaking all over the box. This is the first time I've ordered frozen from Thrive and I'm really disappointed.
Just got my delivery and the frozen broccoli and frozen berries are both soft and partially thawed. The dry ice was completely gone.
My order was supposed to arrive Monday and it's now Wednesday. Tracking just says 'in transit' with no updates since Sunday.
I'm trying to use THRIVEMORE at checkout for the frozen food discount but it keeps saying 'invalid code'. I copied it exactly from the email you sent me.
Ordered frozen salmon fillets and they arrived warm to the touch. Not just thawed — warm. I can't feed this to my family. What is going on with your frozen shipping?
I was just charged $60 for an annual membership I forgot I even had. I haven't ordered anything in 4 months. Can I get a refund?
All three frozen pizzas I ordered were thawed and the boxes were soggy. The ice packs in the box were room temperature. This is unacceptable.
THRIVEMORE code won't work for me. I have it in my cart with frozen items and it says the code doesn't exist. I've been a member since 2022.
My jar of coconut oil arrived shattered. Glass everywhere, oil all over my other items. The box had no padding.
Frozen veggie burgers completely defrosted on arrival. Packaging was warm. I'm in California — is this a West Coast issue?
Why was I charged $12 this morning? I thought I cancelled my membership last month. I definitely clicked something to cancel.
Trying to apply the SPRING25 code but it says I'm not eligible. This is literally my first order ever. I signed up because of this promo.
I received the wrong protein powder flavor. Do I need to ship it back? I already opened it because I didn't realize until I used it.
I keep getting an error when I click Place Order. Tried three times. My cart has 8 items and I've been trying for 20 minutes now.
My frozen mango chunks were completely liquid inside the bag. There was barely any dry ice in the shipment. I ordered 5 frozen items and ALL of them were compromised.
The THRIVEMORE code that's supposedly 15% off frozen — not working. I created my account in 2023 if that matters. Super frustrating.
Order placed 8 days ago, still showing processing. I ordered perishable items. Are they just sitting in a warehouse going bad?
Frozen ice cream arrived as a milkshake. Literally liquid. The box was warm when I picked it up from my porch.
I want to cancel my membership. I've been a member for 2 years but the product selection hasn't improved for my dietary needs (low FODMAP).
I submitted a return 10 days ago and still haven't gotten my refund. You said 3-5 business days. It's been 10.
Place Order button isn't doing anything when I click it. No error message, just nothing happens. Using Chrome on my Mac.

I got an email saying use code FREESHIP for free shipping on orders over $49. My cart is $67 but it's still charging me $5.95 for shipping. The code field says it was applied successfully but the shipping charge is still there.
Received organic milk that expires tomorrow. My delivery was already delayed 3 days. So by the time I got it the milk is basically expired.
Fourth order with frozen items, first time they arrived thawed. I'm in Oregon. Everything was soft and refrozen texture. Not safe to eat.
THRIVEMORE isn't working and neither is SPRING25. I want to use at least ONE promo code. My account was created in Jan 2023.
Tracking says delivered yesterday at 2:14 PM but I was home all day and nothing was delivered. I checked with my neighbors too.
Just noticed a $60 charge on my credit card from Thrive Market. I signed up for a free trial A YEAR AGO and forgot about it. I never ordered anything.
My frozen blueberries and frozen cauliflower rice were both thawed. The gel packs were warm. I'm starting to think Thrive can't handle frozen shipping.
Getting a white screen when I try to go to checkout. Cart page works fine but clicking checkout just goes blank. Tried on my phone too — same thing.
I can't log into my account. Reset password link isn't arriving in my email. I've checked spam. It's been 30 minutes.
I was charged twice for the same order — $87.42 on April 8 and again on April 9. Same amount, same card.
My order with frozen items shipped on Monday (ships Mon-Wed for frozen right?) but it's Thursday and FedEx says it won't arrive until Saturday. That's 5 days for frozen food.
This is my SECOND order in two weeks where frozen items arrived thawed. Last time I got a refund but I actually want the food, not refunds. Fix your cold chain.
I have three promo codes and none of them work. THRIVEMORE — invalid. SPRING25 — not eligible. FREESHIP — applied but still charging shipping. What is going on?
I'm being charged $12/month but I thought I signed up for the $60/year plan. That's $144/year vs $60. Can you switch me and refund the difference?
Frozen edamame thawed. Frozen waffles thawed. Literally everything frozen in my order was ruined. I'm in Washington state.
I need to return some supplements but the return label link in my email gives a 404 error. Dead link.
I just placed an order but realized I put my old address. It still says Processing — can you change it to my new address?
The THRIVEMORE code gives me an error that says 'code not recognized' but I'm looking at the promotional email from Thrive right now that says to use it.
I got charged $60 and the renewal email only came 3 days before the charge. That's not enough notice. I would have cancelled if I'd had time to think about it.
Received a case of canned beans and 4 of the 6 cans are severely dented. I don't feel comfortable eating from dented cans.
The search function on your website is returning zero results for everything. I've tried searching 'almonds' 'protein' 'snacks' — all show no results.
I just received my order and every single frozen item is thawed. This is ridiculous. I ordered $45 worth of frozen food and it's all garbage now. I want a full refund AND credit for my trouble.
Code THRIVEMORE from your email campaign isn't working for my account. I've been a member since 2021. The error says 'invalid promo code'.
Ordered last Monday, still haven't received it. Customer service told me 3-7 business days but it's been 8 business days now.
I want to return some face wash that broke me out. It's been opened and used twice. Can I still return it? It's a personal care item.
WHY was I charged again? I've contacted you twice before about cancelling. Each time I was told it was cancelled and then I get charged again.
I just bought your house brand granola and I need to know if it's produced in a facility that also processes tree nuts. My daughter has a severe allergy and the label just says 'may contain'.
Frozen chicken tenders completely thawed and smell bad. I'm worried about food safety. These were supposed to stay frozen. I don't even want a replacement — I want to know this won't happen again.
Tried using code THRIVEMORE. Says invalid. My account email is the same one I used to sign up in 2023. I feel like long-time members are being excluded from promos.
Three glass jars broken in my order — pasta sauce, salsa, and pickles. The box was clearly dropped. Everything else in the box is covered in sauce.
I want to cancel. The prices used to be competitive but now I can find the same products cheaper at Costco. Sorry but it doesn't make financial sense anymore.
My frozen fruit smoothie packs were thawed and leaking. The box was wet on the outside when the driver dropped it off. Whatever cold chain you're using for the West Coast is failing.
SPRING25 says I'm not eligible for this promotion. But I literally just created my account TODAY to use this code. Your Instagram ad says it's for new members.
It's been 12 days since I ordered. I keep getting told 'it's on the way' but the tracking hasn't moved from the origin facility.
I click 'Place Order' and the page just refreshes. Doesn't show an error, doesn't confirm the order. I've tried 5 times. My card isn't being charged at least.
Got the renewal email only 3 days before being charged. That's not enough time. I opened it planning to cancel but by the time I got around to it the next day, I was already charged.
Ordered almond butter, received peanut butter. My son is allergic to peanuts. This is a serious issue — what if he had eaten it without checking?
Returned items on March 28 via the prepaid label. USPS shows it was delivered to your returns center April 2. Still no refund as of today (April 13). That's 11 days since you received it.
How do I skip my next subscription delivery? I can't find the option anywhere in my account. The app and website both seem different from the instructions you emailed me.
There are two pending charges on my card for $52.18 from April 11. I only placed one order. Is one of them just a hold?
I'm at 3 out of my last 4 frozen orders arriving thawed. At this point I've given up on ordering frozen from Thrive. Just want a refund for this latest one.
Ordered April 3 and it's April 14. 11 days. The tracking number doesn't even work anymore — just says 'not found' when I look it up.
FREESHIP code is 'applied' according to the green checkmark but my shipping charge didn't change. Still showing $5.95. Cart total is $52 which is over the $49 minimum.
Just got my first frozen order from Thrive and everything is thawed. Frozen berries are juice. Frozen pizza is floppy. Not a great first impression for a new member.
Cancelling because I moved abroad and you don't ship internationally. Can I get a pro-rated refund for the remaining 7 months of my annual membership?
The return label you emailed me shows the wrong return address. It's going to some random warehouse in Nevada instead of your returns center.
My order history page is showing someone else's orders. I can see orders with a different name and address. This is a privacy issue.
Received organic chicken broth that's past its expiration date. Best by date was March 20, 2026. My order arrived April 10.
I'm trying to stack SPRING25 and FREESHIP but when I add the second code it removes the first one. Your FAQ says promo stacking is supported now.
Package shows delivered to my address at 11:30 AM. I have a Ring camera and there's no footage of any delivery. FedEx left it at the wrong house.
I specifically remember cancelling. I went through the whole process and clicked confirm. But I just got charged $12 again. Something is broken with your cancellation system.
Frozen wild-caught shrimp arrived thawed and smelling fishy. I opened the bag to check and it's clearly been thawed for a while. This is a food safety issue.
My account shows a different email address than the one I signed up with. I didn't change it. Did someone hack my account?
My order total at checkout was $43.17 but my card was charged $48.12. Where did the extra $4.95 come from?
Two weeks waiting for my order. TWO WEEKS. This is supposed to be 3-7 days. I'm seriously considering cancelling my membership over this.
Frozen organic peas arrived thawed and sitting in water inside the bag. Also the frozen mac and cheese was room temperature. This is from my very first frozen order with Thrive.
My friend gave me her referral code and it won't apply. She also tried THRIVEMORE and it's not working for her either. She's been a member since 2022.
Saw a charge for $60 from Thrive Market. I only signed up for the free trial to see if I liked it. I never got a clear warning it would auto-renew at $60.
The frozen fruit bars I ordered were melted and then refrozen — you can tell because the shape is all wrong and the coating is cracked. Clearly a cold chain issue.
Half my order arrived crushed. The box was ripped on one side and items were falling out of the hole.
I received a duplicate shipment of the same order. I want to return the extra one. Do I need to pay for return shipping?
THRIVEMORE gives me 'this promotional code is not valid for your account.' I've been a loyal member for 3 years. Are you excluding existing members from frozen deals?
Three bags of frozen vegetables thawed. This is the third complaint I'm filing about frozen items this month. Please escalate this to management.
My order shipped April 1 and it's April 9. Tracking shows it's been sitting at a FedEx facility in Memphis for 5 days.
I placed my order, got a confirmation page, but no confirmation email. And the order doesn't show up in my account. Was I charged?
Just discovered I've been charged $12/month for 6 months and never used the membership. Not once. Can I get all 6 months refunded?
Frozen breakfast burritos thawed. Frozen smoothie bowls thawed. I'm in California and it seems like every frozen order from the West Coast is affected.
FREESHIP applied at checkout but when I look at my order confirmation email the shipping charge is still there. Was I charged for shipping or not?
Looking for keto-friendly snack recommendations. Your website filter for keto doesn't seem very comprehensive. Am I missing something?
Received someone else's entire order. None of these items are mine. My name isn't even on the packing slip.
I applied SPRING25 to my first order but the discount is only 20%, not 25%. It took 20% off instead of 25%. Math doesn't match the promo name.
My frozen gluten-free waffles arrived thawed. The dry ice in the package was maybe a quarter of what it should be. Tiny piece. Of course everything thawed.
I want to cancel. Between the promo codes never working and the frozen items always arriving thawed, I'm done. Nothing against your team but the experience has been terrible.
It's been 15 business days since my return was delivered to your warehouse and I still haven't received my refund. Your policy says 3-5 days.
White screen of death when I hit checkout. Been happening for 3 days. Tried Chrome, Safari, and Firefox. Same result.
Frozen salmon fillets arrived thawed and discolored. I paid premium for wild-caught and it arrives looking like it's been sitting on a counter all day.
Your Instagram ad has a promo code THRIVE30 that I can't find anywhere in the app. Is this real? When I type it in it says 'code not found'.
My subscribe-and-save order was supposed to arrive April 5. It's April 12 and it hasn't even shipped yet. What's the point of subscribing if it doesn't ship on time?
Got the renewal reminder email on April 9 and was charged on April 12. 3 days notice for a $60 charge is not cool. Your old email used to come a week before.
Opened my almond milk and it smelled sour even though the expiration is next month. The carton was slightly bulging too.
USPS says delivered but nothing at my door. I live in an apartment building and packages often get stolen from the lobby. Can you reship?
I ordered the frozen family meal pack — 6 items, all thawed. $67 worth of food I have to throw away. This is the worst online shopping experience I've had.
Does your Thrive Market brand chocolate contain soy lecithin? I have a soy allergy and the product page doesn't list full ingredients.
I used a $15 credit but my total didn't change. It should have gone from $62 to $47 but I was charged the full $62.
I search for 'organic pasta' and get zero results. But if I browse the pasta category manually I can see dozens of organic options. Your search is broken.
My frozen organic chicken nuggets were completely thawed and warm. I live in San Diego. I think your West Coast frozen carrier is the problem here.
I have a screenshot of the email you sent with THRIVEMORE code. Pasting it exactly. Still invalid. This is false advertising if the code doesn't actually work.
It's day 9 and my order is still sitting in a warehouse in California according to tracking. I'm in Arizona. How does it take 9 days to go one state over?
Cancel my membership effective immediately. Don't try to offer me anything. I've had 4 bad experiences in a row and I'm done.
Placed my order March 29 and it's April 7. Still no delivery. Support told me last week it would arrive by Friday and it didn't.
I want to change the frequency of my coffee subscription from every 2 weeks to every 4 weeks. Can't figure out how to do it on the website.
My order of olive oils came with one bottle cracked and leaking. The other two are fine but covered in oil from the broken one.
Code THRIVEMORE — invalid. My account is from 2022. Please check if there's an account age cutoff blocking the code.
My neighbors found my package 4 houses down. It was left in their bushes. The address label had the right address. FedEx driver just can't read apparently.
Charged $60 for annual renewal. The new email design is confusing — I saw it but thought it was a marketing email, not a renewal notice. It looks like an ad.
Ordered sugar-free granola bars, received regular ones. I'm diabetic and can't eat these. This could be a health issue.
Do I need to return expired products? I have 3 items from my last order that were past expiration on arrival.
THRIVEMORE just spins and then says error. Tried it 4 times. My internet is fine — every other website works.
I'm trying to switch to all-organic household cleaning products. What do you recommend from your selection? Your categories are a bit confusing to navigate.
My glass jar of tahini arrived cracked and half empty. It leaked onto my other groceries. The packaging had zero bubble wrap or protection for the glass.
I see two different membership charges — $12 on March 1 and $60 on March 15. Was I double-charged? It looks like I'm on both monthly and annual.
Another thawed frozen order. Frozen corn, frozen spinach, and frozen berries — all warm. I'm done ordering frozen from Thrive until you fix this.
Neither THRIVEMORE nor FREESHIP is working for me. THRIVEMORE says invalid, FREESHIP says applied but doesn't change the total. I give up.
My subscription order is 6 days late. I subscribe specifically so I don't run out of staples. Now I have to go to the grocery store anyway, which defeats the purpose.
Frozen açaí packets arrived as liquid. I'm in Portland, OR. Every frozen order to the Pacific Northwest seems to have this problem.
I love Thrive's mission but I can't justify the membership fee anymore since I'm buying less. Can I pause instead of fully cancelling?
Where is my $34 refund? It's been 2 weeks since I returned the items. I can see the return was received based on the tracking. Getting really frustrated.
Checkout is completely broken. I've been trying every day for 4 days. White screen, frozen loading, or just nothing happens. I'm about to cancel my membership because I literally can't place orders.
The THRIVEMORE code your customer service rep told me to use last week still doesn't work. She said it would be fixed by today. It's not.
Frozen organic berries soup. That's what I got. Berry soup. Because they were thawed into mush. Along with my frozen waffles which were just sad floppy discs.
Subscribe-and-save order 10 days late. Third month in a row it's been late. Is this a recurring problem or am I just unlucky?
I signed up as a new member today SPECIFICALLY because of the SPRING25 code. Now it says I don't qualify. If you don't honor this I'm requesting a full membership refund.
Frozen turkey burgers thawed. Frozen mixed vegetables thawed. But interestingly the frozen fruit was still partially frozen — so some items are worse than others.

Annual renewal hit my card 3 days after the email. I tried to cancel on the second day after getting the email but there was no obvious cancel button on the membership page. I had to dig through settings.
I moved and changed my email. Now I can't access my account because 2FA goes to the old email address.
Organic eggs arrived with 2 cracked and the rest sitting in egg yolk. The carton was not properly secured in the box.
My entire order smells like the fish sauce bottle that shattered inside the box. Everything is contaminated. Even the sealed items smell.
I'm seeing three charges from Thrive this month: $47.22, $47.22, and $12.00. The first two look like duplicates. The $12 is my membership.
This makes 5 thawed frozen orders for me in the past month. FIVE. I keep getting refunds but I want the actual food to arrive frozen. What is going on with ColdPack?
My saved payment method is showing the full card number — not masked. I can see all 16 digits. This has to be a security issue.
My birthday gift order for my mom was supposed to arrive April 8. It's April 12 and her birthday was yesterday. Totally missed it.

FREESHIP is applied but tax calculation changed. Before applying the code my total was $53.12 with tax. After applying FREESHIP my total is $53.12 with shipping removed but tax increased. Net savings: $0.
This is getting absurd. Thawed frozen items for the 3rd order in a row. I'm in Seattle. Switching to Imperfect Foods for frozen — they've never sent me thawed items.
Package marked delivered at 3 PM but I have a doorbell camera that shows no delivery. I live on a rural route — I think FedEx just marked it delivered without actually delivering.
Frozen bone broth arrived as regular liquid broth. Box was warm. Delivery driver said the package had been sitting at the local facility for 2 days.
THRIVEMORE — invalid code error. My account was created September 2023. I saw someone on Reddit say it only works for accounts made after January 2024. Is that true?
Please cancel. I've been happy with Thrive but my financial situation changed and I need to cut non-essentials.
I purchased your Thrive Market brand almond flour. The bag doesn't mention whether it's processed in a facility with wheat. My wife has celiac. Can you confirm?
I ordered 2 bags of quinoa and received 2 bags of white rice. Order number TM-9918234. Can you send the correct items?
